data.title: Kardan Real Estate Ltd. Announces Significant Bond Issuance
data.description:
Maximize Your Portfolio with Data Driven Insights:

  • Leverage the power of TipRanks' Smart Score, a data-driven tool to help you uncover top performing stocks and make informed investment decisions.
  • Monitor your stock picks and compare them to top Wall Street Analysts' recommendations with Your Smart Portfolio

Kardan Real Es ( (IL:KARE) ) just unveiled an announcement.

Kardan Real Estate Ltd. has announced the issuance of bonds (series F) totaling 176,510,000 NIS, which will be listed for trading on the Tel Aviv Stock Exchange. This public issuance, registered under Mizrahi Tefahot Company for Registrations Ltd., represents a significant step for Kardan Real Estate Ltd., although the full consideration for the securities has yet to be received. This move could potentially strengthen the company’s financial position and impact its market presence.

data.title: Nutriband Expands Partnership with Kindeva for Aversa™
data.description:
Maximize Your Portfolio with Data Driven Insights:

  • Leverage the power of TipRanks' Smart Score, a data-driven tool to help you uncover top performing stocks and make informed investment decisions.
  • Monitor your stock picks and compare them to top Wall Street Analysts' recommendations with Your Smart Portfolio

The latest update is out from Nutriband ( (NTRB) ).

Nutriband Inc. announced the signing of an addendum to its agreement with Kindeva Drug Delivery, formalizing their exclusive partnership and long-term commitment for the development of Aversa™ Fentanyl. This partnership aims to leverage Nutriband’s AVERSA™ abuse-deterrent technology to create the world’s first abuse-deterrent opioid patch, potentially reaching peak annual US sales of $80 million to $200 million.

More about Nutriband

Nutriband Inc. is involved in the development of prescription transdermal pharmaceutical products, with a focus on incorporating aversive agents into transdermal patches to deter the misuse of drugs, such as opioids and stimulants.

YTD Price Performance: 56.48%

Average Trading Volume: 196,964

Technical Sentiment Consensus Rating: Sell

data.description:

An announcement from Affluent Medical SA ( (FR:AFME) ) is now available.

Affluent Medical has disclosed the number of shares and voting rights as of January 31, 2025, which includes 39,348,185 shares and 55,576,930 theoretical voting rights. The announcement provides transparency for stakeholders regarding the company’s capital structure and aligns with regulatory requirements.

More about Affluent Medical SA

Affluent Medical is a French medical technology company focused on developing innovative treatments for structural heart diseases and urinary incontinence. Founded by Truffle Capital, the company aims to become a global leader by offering new generation, minimally invasive implants that are undergoing clinical trials, with plans for market entry in 2026.

The latest announcement is out from Ground Rents Income Fund ( (GB:GRIO) ).

Ground Rents Income Fund PLC successfully held its Annual General Meeting on 13 February 2025, where all proposed resolutions were passed. Key resolutions included the re-election of directors, appointment of auditors, and renewal of authorities related to share allotment and purchase, reflecting shareholder confidence and strategic positioning for future operations.

More about Ground Rents Income Fund

Ground Rents Income Fund PLC operates in the real estate investment sector, specializing in acquiring and managing ground rent assets. The company focuses on generating stable income through investments in freehold and leasehold properties across the United Kingdom.

data.description:
Maximize Your Portfolio with Data Driven Insights:

Storage Drop ( (IL:STRG) ) has issued an announcement.

Storage Drop Storage Technologies Ltd. has announced the postponement of a shareholder meeting originally scheduled for February 16, 2025, to March 2, 2025. The delay is attributed to ongoing discussions with shareholders. The meeting will address the granting of exemption and indemnification letters to Ms. Einav Razon Cohen and the re-appointment of Dr. Tzvika Ben Porat as an external director, reflecting significant governance and leadership considerations pivotal to the company’s strategic direction.

More about Storage Drop

Storage Drop Storage Technologies Ltd. operates in the storage technology industry, focusing on providing innovative solutions for data storage. The company’s primary services include storage management and technology solutions aimed at optimizing data storage for businesses and individuals.

data.title: Duferco Solar Projects Gains CONSOB Approval for Comal S.p.A. Share Acquisition
data.description:

  • Monitor your stock picks and compare them to top Wall Street Analysts' recommendations with Your Smart Portfolio

The latest announcement is out from Comal S.p.A. ( (IT:CML) ).

Duferco Solar Projects S.r.l. has received approval from CONSOB for its voluntary total public purchase offer on the ordinary shares of Comal S.p.A., aiming to acquire all shares except those held by Duferco Travi e Profilati S.p.A. The offer, set at 4.80 euros per share, will be open from February 17 to March 7, 2025, with potential extensions and reopenings. This move indicates a strategic expansion effort by Duferco in the renewable energy sector, potentially affecting stakeholders’ interests and market dynamics.

More about Comal S.p.A.

data.title: IsoEnergy Expands Financing to Enhance Uranium Exploration
data.description:
Maximize Your Portfolio with Data Driven Insights:

  • Leverage the power of TipRanks' Smart Score, a data-driven tool to help you uncover top performing stocks and make informed investment decisions.
  • Monitor your stock picks and compare them to top Wall Street Analysts' recommendations with Your Smart Portfolio

IsoEnergy ( (TSE:ISO) ) has shared an announcement.

IsoEnergy Ltd. has announced an increase in its bought deal financing due to high demand, raising gross proceeds of approximately C$17,400,000 through the sale of flow-through shares. The proceeds will be used for exploration of the company’s uranium assets in Saskatchewan and Quebec. Additionally, IsoEnergy plans a concurrent private placement of common shares with NexGen Energy Ltd. for up to C$6,250,000 to maintain NexGen’s ownership interest. This financial maneuvering aims to bolster IsoEnergy’s exploration capabilities and strengthen its market position in the critical minerals sector.

More about IsoEnergy

IsoEnergy Ltd. operates in the mineral exploration industry, focusing on uranium assets located in Saskatchewan and Quebec. The company is involved in the identification and development of mineral resources, positioning itself in the market to benefit from the exploration and potential exploitation of critical mineral mining expenditures in Canada.
